/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.0.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/bignum.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bignum.dir/threadpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bignum.dir/bignum.cpp.o -o bignum
